containerDefinitions.name: curl-test
command: echo 'Testing Ollama API...'; curl -v http://10.0.0.72:11434/api/tags; echo '\n\nTesting model endpoint...'; curl -v http://10.0.0.72:11434/api/generate -d '{"model":"dictalm2.0-instruct:Q4_K_M","prompt":"Hello","stream":false}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'; sleep 30
